title: Smart Garden Yule Play Log Squeaky Dog Toy - 18cm - Christmas Dog Toy - Perfect Present for Dogs, Festive Dog Gift, Soft Squeaky Dog Toy
features: 🌟 Festive Yule Log Design: Plush toy shaped like a Yule log with fun holiday details.
🐾 Engaging Squeaker: Built-in squeaker to keep your dog entertained during playtime.
📏 Compact 18cm Size: Perfect for dogs of all sizes to enjoy interactive or solo play.
🌟 Durable and Safe: Made with high-quality, pet-safe materials for long-lasting use.
🎁 Perfect Dog Gift: A thoughtful and entertaining present for your dog this Christmas.
description: Treat your dog to festive fun with the Smart Garden Yule Play Log Squeaky Dog Toy. This 18cm soft plush toy is designed to look like a classic Yule log, complete with festive accents. Perfect for interactive play, cuddles, or chewing, the built-in squeaker keeps your dog entertained throughout the holiday season. Made with durable, pet-safe materials, it’s suitable for dogs of all sizes and makes an excellent Christmas gift for your furry friend. Whether as a stocking filler or a standalone present, it’s sure to bring joy to your dog this Christmas.
